headline: S&P Global Reorients Data And AI Focus As Market Intelligence Chief Exits
summary: S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) is undergoing an executive change as Saugata Saha, President of S&P Global Market Intelligence and Chief Enterprise Data Officer, departs. The Enterprise Data Organization is being moved under the Chief Technology & Transformation Office to support faster integration of artificial intelligence across the company. This reorganization reflects a shift in how S&P Global manages and deploys its data capabilities. S&P Global, known for its indices, credit ratings, and data...

headline: Investor Sentiment Declines, Leading to S&P Global (SPGI) Slide
summary: Impax Asset Management, an investment management firm based in London, specializing in sustainable investing, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for its “Impax US Sustainable Economy Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The US Sustainable Economy portfolio underperformed the Russell 1000 benchmark in Q1 2026, primarily due to its lack of […]
